trending_videos.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2 | Final Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Watch the new trailer for The Devil Wears Prada 2 with original song “Runway” performed by Lady Gaga and Doechii. Get tickets now and experience the film only in theaters May 1: https://Fandango.com/TheDevilWearsPrada2

Almost 20 years after making their iconic turn as Miranda, Andy, Emily and Nigel—Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt and Stanley Tucci return to the fashionable streets of New York City and the sleek offices of Runway Magazine in the eagerly awaited sequel to the 2006 phenomenon that defined a generation. 
 
The film reunites the original main cast with director David Frankel and writer Aline Brosh McKenna, and introduces an all-new runway of characters including Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak and Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms and Tibor Feldman also reprise their roles as “Lily” and “Irv” from the first film. 
 
“The Devil Wears Prada 2” is produced by Wendy Finer

trending_videos.title: Championship: UConn vs. Michigan
trending_videos.description: Michigan and UConn meet at Lucas Oil Stadium for the national title. The Wolverines seek the Big Ten's first championship since 2000 despite an injury to Yaxel Lendeborg. Dan Hurley's Huskies eye a third ring in four years after beating Illinois.

trending_videos.title: Honest Trailers | Avatar: Fire and Ash
trending_videos.description:
Well paint me blue and call me Na’vi, it’s time for another one a them Avatar movies! Fire and Ash? More like tired and a$$. James Cameron get yourself out the ocean and go fix the Terminator franchise you old so and so.

Voice Narration: Jon Bailey the EPIC VOICE GUY (@epicvoiceguy on all socials)
Title Design: Robert Holtby
Written by: Spencer Gilbert and Lon Harris
Produced by: Spencer Gilbert
Edited by: Kevin Williamsen
Post-Production Manager: Emin Bassavand
Manager, Video Operations: Tiffany Tse
Post-Production Specialist: Rebecca Castaneda
VP Content: Max Dionne

trailer_dominance.description: Trailers are currently dominating the trending videos, with 5 out of 10 videos being trailers or related to upcoming releases.
trailer_dominance.opportunity: Focus on exclusive content releases, teasers, and behind-the-scenes footage to leverage the high interest in trailers.

news_and_politics.description: News-related content accounts for a significant portion of the trending list.
news_and_politics.opportunity: Create timely, engaging news content with a focus on major global events to attract viewers.

entertainment_mix.description: There is a mix of entertainment content, including animation ('Rick and Morty') and parodies ('Honest Trailers').
entertainment_mix.opportunity: Develop content that merges humor with popular culture, such as satirical reviews or animated shorts.

A24.strategy: Leverage high-quality production and exclusive sneak peeks to maintain viewer interest.

FOX News.strategy: Capitalize on current events and political discussions to drive engagement.

20th Century Studios.strategy: Use cross-platform promotion and collaborations with influencers to boost trailer reach.

TBS.strategy: Highlight sports-related content, especially major championships and tournaments.

Screen Junkies.strategy: Create humorous, relatable content that appeals to both casual viewers and film enthusiasts.

cross-category content.description: Blend elements from different categories like news, entertainment, and sports to create hybrid content.
cross-category content.example: A comedic take on political events or a sports analysis with pop culture references.

global reach.description: Expand content to appeal to international audiences, especially with trailers and global news.
global reach.strategy: Include subtitles and culturally relevant references to broaden appeal.

engagement strategies.description: Use interactive content such as polls, Q&A sessions, and live streams to increase viewer interaction.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
